name: CU Gate
description: Main entrance and security checkpoint of Covenant University.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi ni enu-bode akọkọ ati aaye aabo Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu onu uzo isi na ebe nche Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na the main gate and security checkpoint for Covenant University.

name: CU Stadium
description: University sports stadium used for athletic events and ceremonies.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ibi idaraya ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe egwuregwu na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na sports area for Covenant University.

name: EIE Building
description: Electrical and Information Engineering faculty building. Houses 11 laboratories, 1 workshop, 3 classrooms and 46 offices.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: Civil Engineering Building
description: College of Engineering — Civil Engineering. Houses 7 laboratories, 1 workshop, 4 classrooms and 26 offices.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: Mechanical Engineering Building
description: College of Engineering — Mechanical Engineering. Houses 11 laboratories, 5 workshops, 3 classrooms and 40 offices.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: ALDC Building
description: African Leadership Development Centre. Houses a 500-capacity conference hall with gallery, seminar room, two dining halls and a gymnasium.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: CU Guest House
description: Official university guest accommodation with executive suites, mini-suites and standard rooms. Features two conference halls accommodating up to 300 guests.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile isakoso ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe nlekota na ochichi na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na admin area for Covenant University.

name: Cafeteria 2
description: One of three strategically located cafeterias on campus serving both local and continental dishes for staff and students.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Okan ninu awon cafeteria meta lori campus ti n pese ounje agbegbe ati kariaye fun osise ati akekoo.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Otu n'ime kafeteria ato di na campus, na-enye nri obodo na nke mba ofesi nye ndi oru na umu akwukwo.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na one of the three campus cafeterias wey dey serve local and continental food for staff and students.

name: CUCRID Building
description: Centre for Research, Innovation and Discovery (CUCRID). A new generation research complex functioning as the hub of the University's research efforts.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: Senate Building
description: Main administrative hub of the University. A six-floor building with penthouse, 26.9m high — the tallest on campus. Houses offices of Principal Officers and a Senate chamber seating 240 members.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile isakoso ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe nlekota na ochichi na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na admin area for Covenant University.

name: Lecture Theatre
description: Two major air-conditioned lecture halls: Hall 1 seats 2,500 students and Hall 2 seats 1,400. Equipped with full multimedia teaching and learning facilities.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: Diamond Bank
description: On-campus Diamond Bank branch and ATM services.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile isakoso ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe nlekota na ochichi na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na admin area for Covenant University.

name: Petroleum and Chemical Building
description: Faculty of Petroleum and Chemical Engineering.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: Zenith Bank / ICT Centre
description: On-campus Zenith Bank branch and university ICT support centre.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile isakoso ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe nlekota na ochichi na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na admin area for Covenant University.

name: CST Building
description: College of Science and Technology. A three-storey complex with 25 lecture rooms, 17 science laboratories, 45 offices, 4 conference rooms and state-of-the-art computer laboratories with ~250 networked PCs.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: CMSS / CLDS Building
description: College of Business and Social Sciences (CMSS) and College of Leadership Development Studies (CLDS). A three-storey ultra-modern structure with a total floor space of 12,748 m².

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: CEDS Building
description: Centre for Entrepreneurial Development Studies (CEDS). Houses 8 lecture rooms, 3 workshop spaces, a 150-capacity multipurpose hall and 19 office spaces.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ile eko ati iwadi ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe omumu na nyocha na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na academic area for Covenant University.

name: Dorcas Hall
description: Female student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Ibugbe awon akekoo obinrin. O ni yara apapo, buttery, yara foonu, saluni ati ofisi isakoso.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ulo obibi umu akwukwo nwanyi. O nwere ime ulo nzuko, buttery, ime ekwenti, ebe mma na ofisi nlekota.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na female student hostel. E get common room, buttery, phone room, salon and admin office.

name: CU Chapel
description: Covenant University Chapel — an ultra-modern architectural masterpiece seating 3,500. Houses the Chaplaincy, Directorate of Physical Planning and Development, and the Student Council offices.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Sooṣi pataki Covenant University pẹlu ijoko to ju 3,500 lo ati awon ofisi chaplaincy ati council akekoo.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu chapel isi nke Covenant University nwere oche kariri 3,500 tinyere ofisi chaplaincy na student council.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na the main Covenant University chapel, e fit sit over 3,500 people and e get chaplaincy and student council offices.

name: Centre for Learning Resources (CLR)
description: University Library — an ultra-modern glass structure on three floors totalling 11,300 m². Accommodates ~2,500 readers and 500 staff and postgraduate students.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Ile-ikawe yunifasiti to tobi lori ipakà meta, pẹlu aaye kika ati ohun elo iwadi fun akekoo ati awon osise.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ulo akwukwo ukwu nke mahadum n'elu ulo ato, nwere ebe ogugu na akụrụngwa nyocha maka umu akwukwo na ndi oru.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na the university main library for three floors, with reading spaces and research resources for students and staff.

name: Eagle Square
description: Open recreational square and social gathering space.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Eyi je ibi isinmi ati ajosepo ni Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu ebe ezumike na nturu ugo na Covenant University.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na recreation area for Covenant University.

name: Postgraduate Hall of Residence
description: Male and female postgraduate halls of residence. Two buildings of 4 floors each with 200 rooms per building, accommodating 400 students each. Serviced by a cafeteria accommodating 1,000–1,500 persons.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Ibugbe postgraduate fun okunrin ati obinrin; ile mejeeji ni ipakà merin, yara 200 kọọkan, ati cafeteria nla.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ulo obibi postgraduate maka nwoke na nwanyi; ulo abuo nwere ulo elu ano, ime ulo 200 nke o bula, tinyere cafeteria buru ibu.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na postgraduate residence for male and female students, two blocks with four floors and 200 rooms each plus a large cafeteria.
